parameters.command: cat /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-crowdsec-alerts-gr.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'; echo '---MAINT---'; cat /home/app-user/gateway.maintenance 2>/dev/null || echo 'NONE'; echo '---LEARN---'; sqlite3 /app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db "SELECT scenario||'|'||host FROM crowdsec_scenario_stats WHERE auto_suppressed = 1;" 2>/dev/null || echo ''

={{ "echo '" + $('Parse Alert').first().json.stateB64 + "' | base64 -d > /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-crowdsec-alerts-gr.json.tmp && mv /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-crowdsec-alerts-gr.json.tmp /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-crowdsec-alerts-gr.json; sqlite3 /app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db \"INSERT INTO crowdsec_scenario_stats (scenario, host, total_count, last_seen) VALUES ('" + $('Parse Alert').first().json.scenario + "', '" + $('Parse Alert').first().json.host + "', 1, datetime('now')) ON CONFLICT(scenario, host) DO UPDATE SET total_count = total_count + 1, last_seen = datetime('now');\" 2>/dev/null || true" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity === 'critical' ? 'm.text' : 'm.notice', body: $('Parse Alert').first().json.matrixBody, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: $('Parse Alert').first().json.matrixHtml }) }}

parameters.command:
=LOCK_DIR="/tmp/cs-triage-lock-gr-{{ $('Parse Alert').first().json.sourceIp.replace(/\./g, '-') }}"
if mkdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "PROCEED"
  (sleep 300 && rmdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null) </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1 &
else
  echo "LOCKED"
fi

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.text', body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/security-triage/security-triage.sh ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.sourceIp + ' "CrowdSec: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.scenarioShort + '" ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity + ' crowdsec-' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.host, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/security-triage/security-triage.sh ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.sourceIp + ' "CrowdSec: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.scenarioShort + '" ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity + ' crowdsec-' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.host + '', 'm.mentions': { user_ids: ['@openclaw:matrix.example.net'] } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ issues: [{ idReadable: $('Parse Alert').first().json.existingIssueId }], query: 'state Open' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: 'CrowdSec alert re-detected while issue was in To Verify state. Moving back to Open.

Scenario: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.scenario + '
Source: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.sourceIp + ' on ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.host + '
Severity: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity + '
Time: ' + new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project: { id: '0-13' }, summary: $('Parse Alert').first().json.ytSummary, description: $('Parse Alert').first().json.ytDesc, customFields: [ { name: 'Hostname', $type: 'SimpleIssueCustomField', value: $('Parse Alert').first().json.host }, { name: 'Alert Rule', $type: 'SimpleIssueCustomField', value: $('Parse Alert').first().json.scenario }, { name: 'Severity', $type: 'SimpleIssueCustomField', value: $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity }, { name: 'Alert Source', $type: 'SimpleIssueCustomField', value: 'CrowdSec' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: '\ud83d\udccb Created ' + $('Register Issue').first().json.registeredIssueId + ' for CrowdSec alert: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.scenarioShort + ' from ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.sourceIp + ' on ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.host, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '\ud83d\udccb Created ' + $('Register Issue').first().json.registeredIssueId + ' for CrowdSec alert: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.scenarioShort + ' from ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.sourceIp + ' on ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.host + '' }) }}

parameters.command: =sqlite3 /app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db "INSERT INTO crowdsec_scenario_stats (scenario, host, total_count, suppressed_count, escalated_count, yt_issues_created, last_seen, last_escalated, auto_suppressed) VALUES ('{{ $("Parse Alert").first().json.scenario || 'unknown' }}', '{{ $("Parse Alert").first().json.host || 'unknown' }}', 1, 0, 0, 0, datetime('now'), NULL, 0) ON CONFLICT(scenario, host) DO UPDATE SET total_count = total_count + 1, last_seen = datetime('now');" && echo 'stats updated'

cat /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-crowdsec-alerts-gr.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'; echo '---MAINT---'; cat /home/app-user/gateway.maintenance 2>/dev/null || echo 'NONE'; echo '---LEARN---'; sqlite3 /app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db "SELECT scenario||'|'||host FROM crowdsec_scenario_stats WHERE auto_suppressed = 1;" 2>/dev/null || echo ''

={{ "echo '" + $('Parse Alert').first().json.stateB64 + "' | base64 -d > /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-crowdsec-alerts-gr.json.tmp && mv /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-crowdsec-alerts-gr.json.tmp /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-crowdsec-alerts-gr.json; sqlite3 /app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db \"INSERT INTO crowdsec_scenario_stats (scenario, host, total_count, last_seen) VALUES ('" + $('Parse Alert').first().json.scenario + "', '" + $('Parse Alert').first().json.host + "', 1, datetime('now')) ON CONFLICT(scenario, host) DO UPDATE SET total_count = total_count + 1, last_seen = datetime('now');\" 2>/dev/null || true" }}

Source: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.sourceIp + ' on ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.host + '

parameters.command: =sqlite3 /app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db "INSERT INTO crowdsec_scenario_stats (scenario, host, total_count, suppressed_count, escalated_count, yt_issues_created, last_seen, last_escalated, auto_suppressed) VALUES ('{{ $("Parse Alert").first().json.scenario || 'unknown' }}', '{{ $("Parse Alert").first().json.host || 'unknown' }}', 1, 0, 0, 0, datetime('now'), NULL, 0) ON CONFLICT(scenario, host) DO UPDATE SET total_count = total_count + 1, last_seen = datetime('now');" && echo 'stats updated'
